title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date
scenario: Verify the About tab under App Settings > General displays correct "Up to date" status, version number, and release notes link matching the Figma design.
steps: Open the app and navigate to App Settings.
Locate and tap on the About tab.
Check the displayed status (should show "Up to date").
Verify the version number is shown correctly.
Confirm the release notes link is present and functional.
Compare the layout and data against the Figma design for accuracy.
expected: The About tab displays "Up to date" status, correct version number, and a working release notes link, matching the Figma design.
